The '''43rd Salagori Lancers''' was a unit of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that was active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]<ref name="HR" /> and shared its name with the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim's]] [[Salagor system/Legends|Salagor system]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> The notable unit repeatedly distinguished itself while carrying out special operations.<ref name="HR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The 43rd Salagori Lancers was mentioned in the [[1995]] sourcebook ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'', authored by [[Rick D. Stuart|Rick Stuart]] and [[Paul Sudlow]] and published for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The book gives the unit as an example of a special operations unit that player characters in a Galactic Empire military campaign can be assigned to based on their record of renowned deeds, noting that serving with the 43rd Salagori Lancers would lead to the characters experiencing a lot of action.<ref name="HR" />
